name: KANGLASHA - Guardian of Roots | Oversized Tee
desc: Sacred guardian of Kangla Fort — symbol of protection, authority, and identity.
lore:
Kangla Sha stands as a guardian of power — silent, unshaken, eternal.

It does not move for attention.
It exists as authority itself.
details:
• Oversized relaxed fit
• Premium cotton
• Structured drape
• Statement design
wash:
• Cold wash
• Do not bleach
• Dry in shade
